# cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip (Resource)

Provision and manage a VPC floating (public) IP. The IP is allocated unbound; binding it to a static IP is not managed by this resource (those attributes are read-only). Destroying the resource deprovisions the billable IP — which is refused while it is bound.

To manage this resource you will need the following roles:
  - `vpc_write`
  - `vpc_read`
  - `activity_read`

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Provision an unbound floating (public) IP. The address is allocated by the API.
resource "cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip" "egress" {}

# Provision a floating IP with a description (mutable; applied via a PATCH).
resource "cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip" "described" {
  description = "Production egress IP"
}

# Output the allocated public address.
output "floating_ip_address" {
  value = cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip.egress.ip_address
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the floating IP. Optional and mutable: setting or changing it issues a PATCH on the floating IP. When omitted, the API-assigned value is kept.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the floating IP.
- `ip_address` (String) The public IP address allocated for this floating IP.
- `private_network_id` (String) The ID of the private network this floating IP is associated with when bound.
- `static_ip_address` (String) The address of the static IP this floating IP is bound to, if any.
- `static_ip_id` (String) The ID of the static IP this floating IP is bound to, if any. Read-only: binding is not managed by this resource.
- `vpc_id` (String) The ID of the VPC this floating IP is associated with when bound.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/bash

# Import a floating IP using its ID.
terraform import cloudtemple_vpc_floating_ip.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc
```
